title: Deployment to Companies and Contractors with International Operations
content: The State shall likewise allow the deployment of OFWs to companies and contractors with international operations: Provided, that they are compliant with standards, conditions and requirements, as embodied in the employment contracts prescribed by the POEA and in accordance with internationally-accepted standards.

metadata.source_file: Omnibus IRR of RA 8042 as amended by RA 10022.pdf
